eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 7:10 PM on JUL 15, 2026 Effective until 5:10 AM JUL 16, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for the Mesa Police Department. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. The Mesa Police Department is looking for a white male, Robert Cathey, 66-years-old, approximately 5 feet 2 inches tall and weighing 160 pounds. He has gray hair, a full gray beard, and unknown eye color. He was last seen wearing a gray T-shirt and brown pants. Mr. Cathey was last seen on foot on July 14, 2026, at approximately 8:00 p.m. in the 6600 block of East Baywood Avenue in Mesa, Maricopa County, Arizona. He has a medical condition that may cause confusion and is non-verbal. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
